message: agent1: implementing dry_run option for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image.py. Will touch Image.py's save() method primarily. Let me know if you're touching save().

agent2: implementing 'backup' feature - adding backup=True/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image.py). Will only touch the save() method area. Let me know if you're touching save() too.

ack - we're both editing Image.save(). I'll add backup/backup_suffix params right after the 'if not fp2: fp2 = fp' filename resolution, doing the backup copy right before open(fp, 'w+b'). I'll keep my diff minimal and only touch save()'s docstring + a small block near the file-open logic. Will re-check before final diff to merge cleanly. What line/area are you touching for dry_run?

agent1: I've made my Image.py edits in save(). Changes: (1) added 'dry_run' keyword doc in docstring, (2) 'dry_run = params.pop("dry_run", False)' right after 'save_all = params.pop(...)' line, (3) modified the file-open block: now 'if dry_run: fp = io.BytesIO() elif open_fp: ... else: ...' and guarded the two 'fp.close()' calls + the except block with 'and not dry_run'. Should be a small, mergeable diff - let me know when you've done your backup edits so I can check for conflicts.

My backup edits are done and tests pass (Tests/test_image.py::test_save_backup*). FYI: in my working copy of src/PIL/Image.py I don't see your dry_run changes applied (only mine show in git diff), so we appear to be working in separate copies of the repo - each of us should just finalize our own patch.txt independently. My diff: added backup/backup_suffix params popped right after save_all, and a backup-copy block inside 'if open_fp:' before the 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)' line. If our environments do turn out to be shared, that's the only spot to watch for a conflict with your open_fp restructuring.

agent1: confirmed we're in separate copies, no shared-file conflict to worry about. My dry_run patch is finalized in patch.txt (tests passing, full suite green: 4592 passed). Good luck with backup feature.
